channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: To buy this Bay Area home, you’ll need Anthropic equity
item.description: Someone’s offering an unusual deal for a 13-acre property in Mill Valley, just north of South Francisco.

item.title: Amazon retire plus de 20 % sur ce moniteur OLED rafraîchi à 500 Hz, l’écran ultime pour vos FPS
item.description: Envie d’un écran PC de qualité pour jouer ? Le Gigabyte AORUS FO27Q5P semble idéal : avec sa dalle OLED rafraîchie à 500 Hz, il fera un très bon allié pour lancer vos jeux AAA. Il coûte aujourd'hui 649 euros contre 837 euros de base.

item.title: The best time to buy a new TV is right now — here’s why and what models I would buy
item.description: The best time to buy a new TV is actually right now, and I'm rounding up my favorite models on sale that I recommend from Samsung, LG, and TCL.

item.title: Monitoring LLM behavior: Drift, retries, and refusal patterns
item.description: The stochastic challengeTraditional software is predictable: Input A plus function B always equals output C. This determinism allows engineers to develop robust tests. On the other hand, generative AI is stochastic and unpredictable. The exact same prompt often yields different results on Monday versus Tuesday, breaking the traditional unit testing that engineers know and love.To ship enterprise-ready AI, engineers cannot rely on mere “vibe checks” that pass today but fail when customers use the product. Product builders need to adopt a new infrastructure layer: The AI Evaluation Stack.This fr...

item.title: SpeakOn’s dictation device is a good idea marred by platform limitations
item.description: This $129 device uses MagSafe to stick on the back of an iPhone to power transcription across apps

item.title: Back from the dead? Not quite. I looked into who's using iconic photography brand names like Agfa, Minolta, Rollei any Yashica today — and what I discovered shocked me
item.description: Some camera brands died long ago but their names live on under new management. Here are some of the most notable 'orphaned' brands in the camera industry that have nothing to do with the original companies

item.title: ‘STAGED’: Conspiracy Theories Are Everywhere Following White House Correspondents' Dinner Shooting
item.description: The word “staged” exploded on social media following the attack, as both right and left-wing influencers and anonymous accounts spread unfounded conspiracy theories.

item.title: Skylight’s 15-inch smart calendar is down to its lowest price to date
item.description: When you’re juggling more than just your own calendar, staying organized can be overwhelming. Fortunately, the Skylight Calendar 2 can help simplify things by syncing multiple calendars in a single spot, and now through May 7th, it’s available directly from Skylight for $259.99 ($40 off), its best price to date. Skylight’s 15-inch smart calendar improves […]...

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — how to get yours
item.description: How to get free iPhone. Get the Apple iPhone 17 for free from T-Mobile when you trade in an eligible device and sign up for the Experience More plan.

item.title: On est monté à bord du Zeekr 8X : 1 381 ch, une recharge en 9 minutes et un luxe indécent face à Porsche et Mercedes
item.description: Avec son architecture 900V, ses 1 381 ch en version trimoteur et un intérieur digne d’une limousine, le Zeekr 8X est probablement le SUV hybride rechargeable le mieux fini que nous ayons approché en Chine. Nous sommes allés le découvrir en concession à Shenzhen.

item.title: La batterie au sodium franchit un cap décisif : vers la fin du lithium ?
item.description: Une équipe de chercheurs a développé une batterie au sodium tout-solide fonctionnant à température ambiante et même en dessous de zéro.

item.title: There’s one iOS 27 upgrade I want to see at WWDC 2026 — and it isn't Siri 2.0
item.description: With WWDC 2026 just around the corner, I’d love to see Apple revamp the Shortcuts app in iOS 27.
